title: Some users may be unable to export Microsoft Intune reports
impact: Users may have been unable to export Microsoft Intune reports.

updates.content:
Title: Some users may be unable to export Microsoft Intune reports

User impact: Users may be unable to export Microsoft Intune reports.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with Microsoft Intune and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Some users may be unable to export Microsoft Intune reports

User impact: Users may be unable to export Microsoft Intune reports.

Current status: We've identified a portion of infrastructure responsible for facilitating Intune report exporting requests was experiencing a higher than expected volume of traffic, resulting in the impact. We've manually rebalanced traffic and we're monitoring service health metrics, as well as validating with a subset of affected users, to ensure this has remediated the impact.

Scope of impact: Some users in North America attempting to export Intune reports may be impacted.

Root cause: A portion of infrastructure responsible for facilitating Intune report exporting requests was experiencing a higher than expected volume of traffic, resulting in the impact. 

Next update by: Friday, July 17, 2026, at 5:30 PM UTC

Title: Some users may be unable to export Microsoft Intune reports

User impact: Users may have been unable to export Microsoft Intune reports.

Final status: We've confirmed after verifying with a subset of affected users that our traffic management solution was effective and the impact has been remediated.

Scope of impact: Some users in North America attempting to export Intune reports may have been impacted.

Start time: Monday, July 13, 2026, at 5:29 AM UTC

End time: Friday, July 17, 2026, at 4:03 PM UTC

Root cause: A portion of infrastructure responsible for facilitating Intune report exporting requests was experiencing a higher than expected volume of traffic, which resulted in the impact.

Next steps: - We're applying further traffic management optimizations in the affected infrastructure to bolster traffic management capabilities and prevent further issues from occurring.

This is the final update for the event.
